title: Ranwid the Elder
description:
You are approached by the [purple]oldest person you have ever seen[/purple].
[sine]"We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!"[/sine]

You do not know this man.

options.title: Give [one of your potions]
options.requires: You don't have any Potions that can be given.

options.title: Give [one of your relics]
options.requires: You don't have any Relics that can be given.

conditions: Each player must have at least 100 Gold
Each player must have at least one Potion
Each player must have at least one tradable Relic
notes:
[gold]Ranwid trades items for Relics:[/gold] Each choice has a different yield. Trading a Potion or spending 100 Gold both grant 1 random Relic, while trading one of your Relics yields [blue]2[/blue] random Relics, making it the most valuable option if available.

The specific Potion and Relic presented are randomly selected at event generation time. If you lack the required item (no Potions or no tradable Relics), those options appear locked and cannot be selected.

Note: Only [purple]tradable[/purple] Relics can be given away. Some Relics have the locked property and cannot be traded, so the Relic option only appears if you have at least one tradable Relic.
